name: Dreamina
description: An all-in-one AI creative platform by CapCut that empowers users to generate high-quality images and cinematic videos from text prompts or existing images with advanced motion control.

name: PixVerse AI
description: A versatile AI video generation platform that enables users to create high-quality cinematic videos from text, images, or existing video references with advanced motion control and professional editing features.

name: Higgsfield AI
description: An all-in-one generative AI platform designed for professional-grade video production, offering high-fidelity cinematic video generation, advanced character consistency, and precise creative controls for filmmakers and marketers.

name: Hailuo AI
description: A cutting-edge AI video generator powered by the MiniMax model, renowned for creating hyper-realistic human movements, complex character interactions, and high-fidelity cinematic scenes from simple text prompts.

name: Kling AI
description: A world-leading AI video generation model capable of producing high-definition cinematic videos up to 2 minutes long, featuring large-scale motion, complex physical simulations, and stunning photorealistic quality.

name: Luma AI
description: A powerful AI video creation platform featuring Dream Machine, designed to generate high-quality, realistic videos with consistent physics and cinematic storytelling from text and images at an impressive speed.

name: Seedance AI
description: A sophisticated AI video generation tool specializing in cinematic character consistency and creative visual effects, enabling creators to transform ideas into high-definition videos with precise motion and style control.

name: Lovart AI
description: An AI-powered design and illustration platform that enables users to generate high-quality graphic assets, unique artworks, and creative layouts through intuitive text-to-image and design enhancement tools.

name: Dribbble
description: The world's leading community for creative professionals to share, grow, and get hired, serving as a premier destination for design inspiration, portfolio showcasing, and digital talent networking.

name: Iconsax
description: A premium and comprehensive icon library for UI/UX designers, featuring thousands of modern icons in multiple styles such as linear, bold, and bulk, optimized for web and mobile application development.

name: Unicorn Studio
description: A powerful design tool for creating high-performance web effects and animations, allowing designers to build stunning visual interactions, shaders, and dynamic assets with no-code ease.

name: Lovable
description: An advanced AI-powered full-stack web development platform that enables users to build, deploy, and iterate on complex applications through natural language prompts with production-ready code.

name: Framer
description: A premier professional website builder that bridges the gap between design and development, allowing users to create high-performance, responsive, and visually stunning sites with intuitive no-code tools.

name: GenSpark AI
description: An innovative AI-powered search agent that goes beyond traditional search by generating 'Sparkpages'—custom, organized, and ad-free pages that synthesize information from multiple trusted sources into a single view.

name: YouMind
description: An advanced prompt engineering and management platform that provides curated libraries and optimization tools to help creators unlock the full potential of generative AI models across various domains.

name: Spline
description: An intuitive, web-based 3D design tool that enables creators to build interactive 3D experiences, models, and animations with real-time collaboration and seamless export for web and app development.

name: Cartwheel
description: An innovative AI-powered 3D animation tool that transforms text prompts or video references into high-quality character motions, streamlining the animation workflow for game developers and digital artists.

name: VRoid Studio
description: A specialized 3D character creation tool that allows users to design highly customizable anime-style avatars with intuitive drawing-based features for hair, clothing, and body textures.

name: Hunyuan 3D
description: A state-of-the-art generative AI framework that creates high-fidelity 3D assets from single images or text prompts, featuring rapid synthesis and high geometric accuracy for efficient professional workflows.

name: Mixamo
description: An Adobe-powered platform that simplifies the 3D animation process through automated character rigging and a vast library of high-quality motion-captured animations for game development and visual effects.

name: TRELLIS 3D
description: A state-of-the-art Large Language Model-based system for 3D generation that produces high-quality, structured 3D assets with superior geometric detail and realistic textures from a single image.

name: Hyper3D AI
description: An advanced generative AI platform designed for rapid 3D asset creation, offering high-fidelity modeling and texture generation from text or images to accelerate game development and spatial computing workflows.

name: Sloyd AI
description: A rapid 3D modeling platform that leverages parametric AI to generate clean, optimized, and fully UV-unwrapped 3D assets from a vast library of customizable templates and text prompts.

name: Motion Sites
description: A dedicated prompt engineering hub for AI video creators, offering a curated library of cinematic prompts, camera movement techniques, and stylistic references to maximize the output of generative video models.

name: Perplexity
description: A powerful AI-driven conversational search engine that provides accurate, real-time answers to complex queries with integrated citations from reliable web sources for transparent and efficient research.

name: Mesh3d
description: A curated digital gallery showcasing high-quality 3D assets, design inspiration, and innovative spatial compositions for creators.

name: Design Spells
description: A curated library of delightful micro-interactions and exceptional UI details designed to inspire polished digital experiences.

name: ChatGPT
description: A versatile AI powered by advanced large language models, offering comprehensive capabilities in natural language processing, complex problem solving, multimodal image generation, and expert-level programming assistance.

name: AI Studio
description: A fast, web-based prototyping environment by Google for building with the Gemini model family. It allows developers to test prompts, tune models, and handle multimodal inputs including code, images, and audio with seamless API integration.

name: Claude
description: A next-generation AI assistant by Anthropic known for its advanced reasoning and coding capabilities. It features a large context window and the Artifacts UI, enabling developers to write, debug, and preview code in real-time with high accuracy.

name: Gemini
description: Google's most capable AI assistant built to be natively multimodal. It excels at reasoning across text, images, and code, offering a seamless experience for creative writing, complex programming assistance, and high-quality image generation.

name: Meta AI
description: An advanced AI assistant powered by Llama 3 that integrates across Meta's ecosystem. It offers fast conversational responses, complex coding assistance, and the ability to generate high-quality images and short animations or videos from simple text prompts.

name: Qwen
description: A powerful series of large language models developed by Alibaba Cloud, designed for high-performance reasoning and multilingual support. It excels in complex coding tasks, conversational AI, and advanced multimodal understanding, including video and image analysis.

name: DeepSeek
description: An advanced open-source AI model series optimized for high-level reasoning and programming. It is widely recognized for its state-of-the-art coding capabilities, offering developers an efficient and powerful alternative for complex logic, math, and software development tasks.

name: Kimi
description: An intelligent AI assistant developed by Moonshot AI, specializing in long-context processing. It excels at analyzing massive documents, complex coding projects, and providing precise conversational insights with a focus on high-capacity memory and efficiency.

name: Grok
description: An AI developed by xAI that features real-time access to global information via the X platform. Designed with a unique sense of wit, it offers powerful capabilities in coding, conversational reasoning, and high-fidelity image and video generation through its advanced multimodal architecture.

name: Bolt
description: An AI-powered full-stack web development platform that allows users to prompt, build, and deploy entire applications directly in the browser. It combines advanced reasoning with a live development environment to automate coding, project structure, and deployment in seconds.

name: Copilot
description: An AI-powered developer tool that provides real-time code suggestions and entire functions directly within the IDE. Trained on billions of lines of code, it acts as an AI pair programmer to accelerate development, automate repetitive tasks, and improve code quality across numerous languages.

name: Cursor
description: An AI-native code editor built as a fork of VS Code, designed for deeply integrated software development. It features advanced codebase indexing, allowing the AI to understand entire projects, automate complex refactors, and generate code with full project context.

name: Windsurf
description: An AI-powered integrated development environment (IDE) that introduces 'Flow'—a state-of-the-art agentic workflow. It allows the AI to act as an independent collaborator that can see, think, and act across your entire codebase to solve complex tasks autonomously.

name: Antigravity
description: A high-performance development platform by Google designed to streamline the creation of AI-powered applications. It provides developers with integrated tools to build, test, and scale sophisticated software, leveraging Google’s advanced infrastructure and model capabilities.

name: Trae AI
description: An adaptive, AI-native integrated development environment (IDE) developed by ByteDance. It enhances developer productivity through 'Builder Mode' and intelligent context-awareness, transforming natural language instructions into functional code within a high-performance workspace.

name: Blackbox AI
description: A powerful AI coding assistant designed to accelerate software development by providing ultra-fast code autocomplete, integrated chat for debugging, and the ability to search across millions of open-source repositories and documents in real-time.

name: v0
description: An AI-powered generative UI system by Vercel that streamlines web development. It translates natural language prompts into high-quality, production-ready React components using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI, featuring a real-time preview and seamless integration into modern web frameworks.

name: Scite
description: An award-winning platform that helps researchers discover and evaluate scientific articles via Smart Citations. It allows users to see how a publication has been cited by providing the context of the citation and a classification describing whether it provides supporting or contrasting evidence.

name: Elicit
description: An AI research assistant designed to automate literature reviews and data extraction from academic papers. It helps researchers find relevant studies without perfect keyword matches, summarizes key findings, and extracts specific data points across multiple documents simultaneously.

name: Research Rabbit
description: An innovative citation-based discovery tool often called the 'Spotify for Papers.' It allows researchers to create dynamic collections of literature and visualizes connections between authors and papers through interactive maps to discover hidden research networks.

name: SciSpace
description: An all-in-one AI platform for scientific research that simplifies reading and understanding academic papers. It features an interactive AI Copilot to explain complex text, math, and tables in real-time, alongside a massive repository and integrated literature review tools.

name: Consensus
description: A specialized search engine that uses AI to extract and distill findings from scientific research. It allows users to ask questions and receive instant answers backed by peer-reviewed studies, providing a 'consensus' meter to show the prevailing scientific opinion on a topic.

name: Suno
description: An innovative AI music creation platform that generates full-length songs, including realistic vocals, instrumentation, and lyrics, from simple text descriptions. It enables anyone to produce high-quality audio tracks across a wide variety of genres in seconds.

name: Udio
description: A state-of-the-art AI music generation platform renowned for its high-fidelity audio production and professional-grade vocal realism. It empowers users to compose, extend, and remix tracks from text prompts, offering granular control over musical styles, structure, and emotional nuance.

name: ElevenLabs
description: The world's most advanced AI audio platform specializing in lifelike speech synthesis and voice cloning. It offers high-fidelity text-to-speech, real-time dubbing, and emotive voice generation in dozens of languages, catering to content creators, developers, and storytellers.

name: Hume AI
description: An emotionally intelligent AI platform featuring the Empathic Voice Interface (EVI). It is designed to understand and react to human vocal modulations, including tone, rhythm, and pitch, enabling more natural and empathetic human-AI interactions.
